nasb.text: So the Lord was very angry with Israel and removed them from His sight; none was left except the tribe of Judah.

esv.text: Therefore the Lord was very angry with Israel and removed them out of his sight. None was left but the tribe of Judah only.

cnv.text: 於是耶和華向以色列人大大發怒，把他們從自己面前趕走，只剩下猶大一個支派。

ccb.text: 因此，耶和华非常愤怒，从祂面前赶走以色列人，只留下犹大一个支派。
